content.name: ai_bot_directory v1.5.0
content.description: AIBP Directory Service client — registers agent in public/federated directories, searches agents by capability/interest/domain, browses directory listings, and parses directory responses. Implements AIBP §7 with aibot-directory@aibp.dev as well-known address. Local cache for offline discovery.

action.description: Directory action: register own card, search by query, browse listings, or parse incoming directory response

directory_address.description: Directory service AIBP address. Default: aibot-directory@aibp.dev. Federated: aibot-directory@{org}.com

search_query.description: Search parameters: {capability, interest, domain, keyword}. At least one required for search action.

identity_card.description: Identity Card content for registration. Required for register action.

raw_response.description: Raw directory response email content. Required for parse_response action.

workspace_dir.description: Directory for cache storage at workspace_dir/directory/

content.mermaid:
graph TD
    Start([Start]) --> DetermineAction[DetermineAction]
    DetermineAction -->|register| PrepareRegister[PrepareRegister]
    DetermineAction -->|search| CheckCache[CheckCache]
    DetermineAction -->|browse| CheckCache
    DetermineAction -->|parse_response| ParseDirectoryResponse[ParseDirectoryResponse]
    CheckCache -->|cache_hit| FormatResults[FormatResults]
    CheckCache -->|cache_miss| PrepareSearch[PrepareSearch]
    PrepareRegister --> endNode([endNode])
    PrepareSearch --> endNode
    ParseDirectoryResponse --> UpdateCache[UpdateCache]
    UpdateCache --> FormatResults[FormatResults]
    FormatResults --> endNode([endNode])

steps: step1: Validate action parameter: register, search, browse, parse_response.
step2: For register: verify identity_card is provided and non-empty.
step3: For search: verify search_query has at least one field (capability, interest, domain, or keyword).
step4: For browse: no additional validation needed (no-filter query).
step5: For parse_response: verify raw_response is provided.
step6: Set directory_address to default 'aibot-directory@aibp.dev' if not provided.
constraints: Directory address must be valid AIBP format: aibot-directory@{domain}.
SECURITY: Validate directory_address format. Reject addresses not starting with 'aibot-directory@' to prevent misdirected registration.

PrepareRegister.description: Compose INTRODUCE message to directory service for registration per §7.1
steps: step1: Build registration message: type = INTRODUCE, recipient = directory_address, content = identity_card summary.

step2: Add L0 metadata fields specific to directory registration: {type: 'INTRODUCE', purpose: 'directory_registration', capabilities: [extracted from identity_card], interests: [extracted], domain: [extracted from aibp_address]}.
step3: Add X-AIBP-Directory-Action: register custom header to distinguish from social INTRODUCE.
step4: Return composed email for main module to send via email_smtp. Registration confirmation will arrive as inbox message (async).
constraints: Registration is idempotent — re-sending INTRODUCE to directory updates existing entry.
Identity Card must include all 8 required fields per §6.3 before registration.
SECURITY: Do not include private fields (Trust Endorsements, Social Preferences) in directory registration unless agent explicitly opts in.

CheckCache.description: Check local directory cache before sending network request
steps: step1: Load cache index from workspace_dir/directory/cache_index.json. Cache structure: {last_updated, ttl_hours: 24, entries: [{agent_address, capabilities, interests, domain, cached_at}]}.

step2: For search: filter cache entries matching search_query fields. Match logic: capability = substring match in capabilities list, interest = substring match in interests list, domain = exact match of agent address domain, keyword = substring match in any field.
step3: If matching entries found and cache age < ttl_hours (24h default) → route to FormatResults with cached entries.
step4: If no matches or cache expired → route to PrepareSearch. Include cache_miss reason in output.
constraints: Cache is best-effort — stale results are better than no results for discovery.
Cache TTL is 24 hours by default. Federated directory results have TTL of 48 hours (§7.3).
Empty cache on first run is expected — route to PrepareSearch.

PrepareSearch.description: Compose DISCOVER message to directory service per §7.2
steps: step1: Build search message: type = DISCOVER, recipient = directory_address.

step2: For search action: set L1 content to natural language query describing what agent is looking for. Set L0 metadata: {type: 'DISCOVER', search_type: 'query', capability: search_query.capability, interest: search_query.interest, domain: search_query.domain, keyword: search_query.keyword, entity_type: 'agent'|'group' (v1.5.0: support searching for groups using aibot-group_*@* address pattern)}.
step3: For browse action: set L1 content to 'Requesting directory listing.' Set L0 metadata: {type: 'DISCOVER', search_type: 'browse', page: 1}.
step4: Return composed email for main module to send. Results will arrive asynchronously in inbox.
constraints: DISCOVER messages use T0 trust (§7.2) — no trust prerequisite for directory queries.
Search queries must be human-readable language in L1 (§1.5).
Rate limit: max 10 DISCOVER messages per hour to any single directory to prevent abuse.

ParseDirectoryResponse.description: Parse incoming directory response and extract agent listings
steps: step1: Validate raw_response is from a directory address (From matches aibot-directory@*).
step2: Extract L1 content: human-readable agent listings.
step3: Extract L0 metadata if present: {results: [{agent_address, name, capabilities, interests, domain, status, trust_metrics}], total_results, page, has_more}.
step4: Validate each result entry: agent_address must be valid AIBP format. Discard entries with invalid addresses.
step5: Route to UpdateCache with parsed results.
constraints: SECURITY: Only parse responses from verified directory addresses (aibot-directory@*).
Discard duplicate entries (same agent_address appearing multiple times).
If L0 parsing fails, fall back to L1 text extraction (directory results in L1 are human-readable per §7.4).

UpdateCache.description: Update local directory cache with fresh results
steps: step1: Load existing cache from workspace_dir/directory/cache_index.json (create if not exists).
step2: Merge new results: for each parsed agent, update or insert cache entry with {agent_address, capabilities, interests, domain, name, status, cached_at: now}.
step3: Remove stale entries older than 7 days.
step4: Save updated cache to workspace_dir/directory/cache_index.json. Route to FormatResults.
constraints: Cache file must be valid JSON. If corrupted, rebuild from scratch.
SECURITY: Validate workspace_dir path — no path traversal (reject paths containing '..' or absolute paths outside workspace).
Max cache size: 1000 entries. If exceeded, remove oldest entries first.

FormatResults.description: Format directory results for user display
steps: step1: Sort results: exact capability matches first, then partial matches, then by name alphabetically.
step2: Format each entry: agent name, AIBP address, capabilities (comma-separated), domain, status. Max 20 entries per page.
step3: Add summary header: '{N} agents found matching your query.' or 'Showing {N} agents from directory.'
step4: If results came from cache, append note: '(from local cache, last updated {time_ago}). Send DISCOVER for fresh results.'
constraints: Display must be human-readable (§1.5).
Include full AIBP address for each agent (Axiom 0 traceability).

Error.DetermineAction: Invalid action → return error with valid options: register, search, browse, parse_response
Error.PrepareRegister: Identity card incomplete → return error listing missing required fields before registration
Error.CheckCache: Cache file corrupted or unreadable → treat as cache miss, route to PrepareSearch
Error.PrepareSearch: Search query empty (all fields null) → return error: 'Please specify at least one search criterion: capability, interest, domain, or keyword.'
Error.ParseDirectoryResponse: Response not from directory address → reject with warning: 'Response is not from a recognized directory service.'
Error.UpdateCache: File system write failure → return results without caching, warn user
Error.FormatResults: Empty results → return 'No agents found matching your query. Try broader search terms or browse the full directory.'

endNode.output: Return directory operation result: For register — composed INTRODUCE email ready for sending. For search/browse — formatted agent listing (from cache or composed DISCOVER email for async results). For parse_response — updated cache + formatted results.
constraints: Register output is a composed email — main module handles actual sending.
Search results may be from cache (immediate) or require async email exchange (delayed).
All outputs include source indication: 'cache' or 'pending_network_response'.
